{{Infobox character
| name = Chaka
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| abilities = sword forms
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

''See also: [[Chaka Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Chaka is a formidable fighter who possesses [[sword]] blades in place of hands. Once a human, he has become an artificial [[construct]], a transformation shared by other guardians. He is typically found resting in the shade of a fruit tree, where he challenges others to duels to earn their meals. While he can appear cheery or even warm, he is often harsh and intimidating, frequently using his blades to threaten or discipline those he deems soft. He wears leather armor that covers all his skin, along with a mask and a helmet that conceals his face, leaving only his yellow gemstone eyes visible. Chaka is an exceptionally skilled combatant who only loses a fight if he chooses to do so. Beyond his physical prowess, his presence has the power to transform environments, such as turning city walls to gold and altering buildings and people. He has also been known to influence others to attempt to drive certain individuals away.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|A man clad in leather, Chaka is distinguished by yellow gemstones that serve as his eyes. During a clash of [[steel]] with [[Kai]], he demonstrates his combat prowess before later being challenged by [[Simon]] during breakfast. Chaka informs [[Simon]] that a [[Dragon's Fang]] can be taken from the entry hall, and he subsequently engages in daily training sessions with the young man. While observing others, Chaka remarks on the speed with which [[Andra]] acquired her [[Dragon's Fang]], though he harbors a dislike for her and may have played a role in [[Nye]] driving her away.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaka]] has yellow gemstones in place of his eyes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6">''House of Blades'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaka]] engages in a clash of [[steel]] with [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7">''House of Blades'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaka]] is a leather man with yellow eyes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] challenges [[Chaka]] for breakfast.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaka]] is a character who says [[Simon]] can take a [[Dragon's Fang]] from the entry hall.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] performs daily training with [[Chaka]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaka]] is someone who commented on how quickly [[Andra]] obtained her [[Dragon's Fang]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18">''House of Blades'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Chaka]] does not like [[Andra]] and may have influenced [[Nye]] to drive her out.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Chaka is a fighter who maintains a garden and resides beneath the shade of a fruit tree. In this location, Chaka duels challengers in exchange for meals and has been observed conversing with a figure within the garden. Possessing [[sword]] blades in place of hands, Chaka once demonstrated this unique physiology by scraping one bladed arm against the other to sharpen them. Additionally, Chaka has served as an instructor, teaching various [[sword]] forms to [[Simon]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Chaka]] taught [[Simon]] [[sword]] forms.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Chaka]] is a fighter who rests in the shade of a fruit tree and duels challengers for meals.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Chaka]] has [[sword]] blades instead of hands.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Chaka]] raised one bladed arm and scraped it across the other as if sharpening knives.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Chaka]] is a person who was in conversation with a figure in the garden.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Chaka]] has a garden.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Chaka]] is mentioned as a potential example of a guardian turning into an artificial [[construct]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"I s'pose you could," Chaka called, "and I won't stop you. So long as all you want is a hunk of sharp metal."<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"Chaka says I got it much faster than you did."<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
